intents.description: User wants to schedule or request a live product/solution demo
example_phrases: I want to see a demo
I'd like to see the robot in action
Can I test the AI system?
intents.action: Collect name, email, company, and schedule demo with sales team

intents.description: User wants detailed information about a specific product
example_phrases: Tell me about the reception robot
What is the cleaning robot model?
What are the specs of AT300?
Tell me about the interactive display
intents.action: Provide product details, features, specifications, and images

intents.description: User wants to know pricing, cost, or get a quote
example_phrases: What is the cost of the cleaning robot?
How much is the AI system?
intents.action: Connect to sales team for custom pricing. Note: pricing is customized per project.

intents.description: User wants to speak with a sales representative
example_phrases: I want to talk to sales
intents.action: Provide contact details: email contact@nantatech.com, WhatsApp +91 99090 41675/41678

intents.description: User needs help with technical issues, troubleshooting, or after-sales support
example_phrases: I need help with the robot
intents.action: Connect to technical support team. Email: contact@nantatech.com, WhatsApp support available.

intents.description: User wants to download product spec sheets or brochures
intents.action: Provide direct links to S3-hosted PDF spec sheets

intents.description: User wants to compare different products or solutions
example_phrases: What's the difference between AT300 and AT600?
Difference between Alpha B2 and GO2
Best robot for my use case
intents.action: Provide comparison of specifications and recommended use cases

intents.description: User asks about solutions for their specific industry
example_phrases: What solutions do you have for hospitals?
How can robots help my hotel?
intents.action: Map industry to relevant products and solutions

intents.description: User wants to book a specific NTRA AI vision demo
example_phrases: I want to see the AI surveillance system
intents.action: Direct to /book-demo page or live demo pages (/face-recognition, /restricted-area, /object-detection, /vehicle-detection)

intents.description: User wants general information about the company
example_phrases: How long have you been in business?
intents.action: Provide company overview, mission, location, and contact

intents.description: User wants to understand how a product or solution applies to their scenario
example_phrases: Can the robot check in guests?
Will NTRA work with my cameras?
How does the cleaning robot navigate?
Can the serving robot avoid obstacles?
intents.action: Explain specific use case and link to relevant product/solution

intents.description: User asks about integrations with existing systems
example_phrases: Does it integrate with our PMS?
Can NTRA connect to our VMS?
Does the robot work with our booking system?
intents.action: Explain integration capabilities (REST API, webhooks, WMS, ERP, VMS, SCADA, BMS)

intents.description: User asks about how and where the system is deployed
intents.action: Explain deployment options (edge/on-prem, air-gapped, cloud), setup timeline
Direct to careers section or contact email

intents.description: User interested in becoming a partner, reseller, or distributor
example_phrases: I want to be a partner
intents.action: Connect to business development team via email

intents.description: User wants to give feedback or report an issue
intents.action: Collect feedback and forward to appropriate team
